translations.en: O! Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha upon thlath fkanma helped upon hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope and mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh and extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah upon hdm his intellect and who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh and his worldly life O! Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk and you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord and you obeyed hwak upon ghlbh 'qlk O! Hisham patience upon alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life and the desirous in it (f) and rghb fyma at/near of Allah and was Allah his intimacy in alwhshh and sahbh in alwhdh and ghnah in al'ylh and m'zh from other than 'shyrh O! Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah and not njah except balta'h and obedience by knowledge and knowledge balt'lm and learning by the intellect is believed and not 'lm except from 'alm rbany and knowledge knowledge by the intellect O! Hisham qlyl al'ml from al'alm mqbwl mda'f and kthyr al'ml from people of desire and ignorance mrdwd
translations.ur: اے Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha پر thlath fkanma helped پر hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope اور mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh اور extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah پر hdm his intellect اور who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh اور his worldly life اے Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk اور you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord اور you obeyed hwak پر ghlbh 'qlk اے Hisham patience پر alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life اور the desirous in it (f) اور rghb fyma at/near of Allah اور was Allah his intimacy میں alwhshh اور sahbh میں alwhdh اور ghnah میں al'ylh اور m'zh سے other than 'shyrh اے Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah اور نہیں njah except balta'h اور obedience by knowledge اور knowledge balt'lm اور learning by the intellect is believed اور نہیں 'lm except سے 'alm rbany اور knowledge knowledge by the intellect اے Hisham qlyl al'ml سے al'alm mqbwl mda'f اور kthyr al'ml سے people of desire اور ignorance mrdwd
translations.tr: ey Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha üzerine thlath fkanma helped üzerine hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope ve mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh ve extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah üzerine hdm his intellect ve who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh ve his worldly life ey Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk ve you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord ve you obeyed hwak üzerine ghlbh 'qlk ey Hisham patience üzerine alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life ve the desirous in it (f) ve rghb fyma at/near of Allah ve was Allah his intimacy içinde alwhshh ve sahbh içinde alwhdh ve ghnah içinde al'ylh ve m'zh -den other than 'shyrh ey Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah ve değil njah except balta'h ve obedience by knowledge ve knowledge balt'lm ve learning by the intellect is believed ve değil 'lm except -den 'alm rbany ve knowledge knowledge by the intellect ey Hisham qlyl al'ml -den al'alm mqbwl mda'f ve kthyr al'ml -den people of desire ve ignorance mrdwd
translations.fa: ای Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha بر thlath fkanma helped بر hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope و mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh و extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah بر hdm his intellect و who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh و his worldly life ای Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk و you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord و you obeyed hwak بر ghlbh 'qlk ای Hisham patience بر alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life و the desirous in it (f) و rghb fyma at/near of Allah و was Allah his intimacy در alwhshh و sahbh در alwhdh و ghnah در al'ylh و m'zh از other than 'shyrh ای Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah و نه njah except balta'h و obedience by knowledge و knowledge balt'lm و learning by the intellect is believed و نه 'lm except از 'alm rbany و knowledge knowledge by the intellect ای Hisham qlyl al'ml از al'alm mqbwl mda'f و kthyr al'ml از people of desire و ignorance mrdwd
translations.id: wahai Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha atas thlath fkanma helped atas hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope dan mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh dan extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah atas hdm his intellect dan who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh dan his worldly life wahai Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk dan you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord dan you obeyed hwak atas ghlbh 'qlk wahai Hisham patience atas alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life dan the desirous in it (f) dan rghb fyma at/near of Allah dan was Allah his intimacy di dalam alwhshh dan sahbh di dalam alwhdh dan ghnah di dalam al'ylh dan m'zh dari other than 'shyrh wahai Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah dan tidak njah except balta'h dan obedience by knowledge dan knowledge balt'lm dan learning by the intellect is believed dan tidak 'lm except dari 'alm rbany dan knowledge knowledge by the intellect wahai Hisham qlyl al'ml dari al'alm mqbwl mda'f dan kthyr al'ml dari people of desire dan ignorance mrdwd
translations.bn: হে Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha উপর thlath fkanma helped উপর hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope এবং mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh এবং extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah উপর hdm his intellect এবং who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh এবং his worldly life হে Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk এবং you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord এবং you obeyed hwak উপর ghlbh 'qlk হে Hisham patience উপর alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life এবং the desirous in it (f) এবং rghb fyma at/near of Allah এবং was Allah his intimacy মধ্যে alwhshh এবং sahbh মধ্যে alwhdh এবং ghnah মধ্যে al'ylh এবং m'zh থেকে other than 'shyrh হে Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah এবং না njah except balta'h এবং obedience by knowledge এবং knowledge balt'lm এবং learning by the intellect is believed এবং না 'lm except থেকে 'alm rbany এবং knowledge knowledge by the intellect হে Hisham qlyl al'ml থেকে al'alm mqbwl mda'f এবং kthyr al'ml থেকে people of desire এবং ignorance mrdwd
translations.es: oh Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha sobre thlath fkanma helped sobre hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope y mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh y extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah sobre hdm his intellect y who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh y his worldly life oh Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk y you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord y you obeyed hwak sobre ghlbh 'qlk oh Hisham patience sobre alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life y the desirous in it (f) y rghb fyma at/near of Allah y was Allah his intimacy en alwhshh y sahbh en alwhdh y ghnah en al'ylh y m'zh de other than 'shyrh oh Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah y no njah except balta'h y obedience by knowledge y knowledge balt'lm y learning by the intellect is believed y no 'lm except de 'alm rbany y knowledge knowledge by the intellect oh Hisham qlyl al'ml de al'alm mqbwl mda'f y kthyr al'ml de people of desire y ignorance mrdwd
translations.fr: ô Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha sur thlath fkanma helped sur hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope et mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh et extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah sur hdm his intellect et who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh et his worldly life ô Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk et you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord et you obeyed hwak sur ghlbh 'qlk ô Hisham patience sur alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life et the desirous in it (f) et rghb fyma at/near of Allah et was Allah his intimacy dans alwhshh et sahbh dans alwhdh et ghnah dans al'ylh et m'zh de other than 'shyrh ô Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah et non njah except balta'h et obedience by knowledge et knowledge balt'lm et learning by the intellect is believed et non 'lm except de 'alm rbany et knowledge knowledge by the intellect ô Hisham qlyl al'ml de al'alm mqbwl mda'f et kthyr al'ml de people of desire et ignorance mrdwd
translations.de: o Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha auf thlath fkanma helped auf hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope und mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh und extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah auf hdm his intellect und who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh und his worldly life o Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk und you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord und you obeyed hwak auf ghlbh 'qlk o Hisham patience auf alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life und the desirous in it (f) und rghb fyma at/near of Allah und was Allah his intimacy in alwhshh und sahbh in alwhdh und ghnah in al'ylh und m'zh von other than 'shyrh o Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah und nicht njah except balta'h und obedience by knowledge und knowledge balt'lm und learning by the intellect is believed und nicht 'lm except von 'alm rbany und knowledge knowledge by the intellect o Hisham qlyl al'ml von al'alm mqbwl mda'f und kthyr al'ml von people of desire und ignorance mrdwd
translations.ru: о Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha на thlath fkanma helped на hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope и mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh и extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah на hdm his intellect и who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh и his worldly life о Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk и you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord и you obeyed hwak на ghlbh 'qlk о Hisham patience на alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life и the desirous in it (f) и rghb fyma at/near of Allah и was Allah his intimacy в alwhshh и sahbh в alwhdh и ghnah в al'ylh и m'zh из other than 'shyrh о Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah и не njah except balta'h и obedience by knowledge и knowledge balt'lm и learning by the intellect is believed и не 'lm except из 'alm rbany и knowledge knowledge by the intellect о Hisham qlyl al'ml из al'alm mqbwl mda'f и kthyr al'ml из people of desire и ignorance mrdwd
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha 在...上 thlath fkanma helped 在...上 hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope 和 mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh 和 extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah 在...上 hdm his intellect 和 who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh 和 his worldly life 啊 Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk 和 you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord 和 you obeyed hwak 在...上 ghlbh 'qlk 啊 Hisham patience 在...上 alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life 和 the desirous in it (f) 和 rghb fyma at/near of Allah 和 was Allah his intimacy 在 alwhshh 和 sahbh 在 alwhdh 和 ghnah 在 al'ylh 和 m'zh 从 other than 'shyrh 啊 Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah 和 不 njah except balta'h 和 obedience by knowledge 和 knowledge balt'lm 和 learning by the intellect is believed 和 不 'lm except 从 'alm rbany 和 knowledge knowledge by the intellect 啊 Hisham qlyl al'ml 从 al'alm mqbwl mda'f 和 kthyr al'ml 从 people of desire 和 ignorance mrdwd
